tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Do it, baby, do what I should think[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m/G#[/ch]
Do it-do it, baby, do what I could think[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Do it-do it, baby, do what I should think[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
Do it-do it, baby, do what I could think[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Do it-do it-do it, baby, do what I should think[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Do it, baby, do what I could think[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Do it-do it-do it, baby, do what I should think[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Do it-do it baby, do what I could think[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
I ain't never rep a set, baby [/tab]

Ain’t doing you wrong
[tab]                 [ch]F#m/G#[/ch]
I could clean up good for you[/tab]

Oh, I know right from wrong
[tab]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
'Cause I wanna make it [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I'm a million dollar baby[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
Yeah, hell no [/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]F#m/G#[/ch]
You rep my city for so damn long [/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
But you still don't notice me, my sound next [/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
VA next, I'm at they neck [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm running up a check [/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
She a bad lil' mama, she a diva[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m/G#[/ch]                                             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
No matter what happens, he cannot come between us again [/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
I know we're better than friends [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
I took her to Queen's Gambit, showed around my friends[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m/G#[/ch]
Tried to pick some energy up, it don't matter [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I know you haven’t moved on if you tried [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
I don't believe it, baby, I know you lied [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
All night long, what you mean, "I changed"?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Haven't stayed the same[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I've been losing my mind[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I said, "The city is mine" [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I ain't never rep a set, baby [/tab]

Ain’t doing you wrong
[tab]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I could clean up good for you [/tab]

Oh, I know right from wrong
[tab]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
'Cause I wanna make it[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I'm a million dollar baby[/tab]

Yeah, hell no
[tab]                    [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I ain't never rep a set, baby [/tab]

Ain’t doing you wrong
[tab]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I could clean up good for you[/tab]

Oh, I know right from wrong
[tab]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
'Cause I wanna make it, so badly[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm a million dollar baby [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Yeah, hell nah [/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]     [ch]F#m/G#[/ch]
Hell-hell no[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Yeah, hell-hell no (Do it, baby, do what I should think)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]
Hell-hell no (Do it-do it, baby, do what I could think)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Do it, baby, do what I should think[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m/G#[/ch]
Do it-do it, baby, do what I could think[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Hell-hell nah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
Yeah, hell-hell nah[/tab]
